full_text:
Lady Sun
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Sun. Quan Shang told her of Sun Liang’s plot against Sun Chen. She warned Chen. Lady Sun was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
